author: Shane Eng
review: Ive lived here in my rotting apartment for almost 2 years now and have seen no improvement to the complex besides a brand new entryway. Ive had my vehicles broken into/ stolen at least 4 times. Homeless people taking over the dumpsters

ownerResponse.text: We're sorry that you havent had an enjoyable stay with us at Barkley. Our team strives on a daily basis to cultivate a welcoming, comfortable living experience for our residents, and we apologize that you havent seen our efforts reflected in your stay. We hope that you'll contact us directly at 360-647-2818 to discuss your experiences further and how you feel we might improve. Thank you.

author: Andy Marshall
review: These people take advantage of young people. My son rented for a year and a half. He was charged for water damage from the apartment above. They found cockroaches after moving in and the management just shrugged it off and said they should

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your review. We sincerely regret that our customer service did not meet your expectations. Our staff members are all professionals dedicated to service excellence, and we strive to provide exemplary care and attention. Kindly have your son who resides with us reach out to us at 360-647-2818 to discuss any issues he feels needs additional attention from us. Thanks again.

author: Rhonda Pool
review: We Love Our Home !! The staff is great & the pool is our favorite place to be!! 20 out of 10!!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for taking a moment to review Barkley! We're so happy that you're enjoying the excellent living experience that we seek to provide for our residents every day. Have a great day!

author: Joseph Daily
review: They let us get through the entire application process before finally mentioning they don't allow huskies. They will take your money knowing they won't accept your application. Would not recommend applying if you have any dogs over 20 pounds or in general as they will happily lie to you to take your money.

author: Tyler Poradun
review: Drove down to the office within posted business hours. Apparently, there is no dedicated receptionist because the office was locked due to a meeting with no return time posted. Knocking or calling yielded no response. I waited for 45

ownerResponse.text: Tyler, we're sorry to hear this feedback. What you described does not reflect our customer service expectations. Our team will continue to work diligently to ensure all visitors of our community receive exemplary customer service. When you get a moment, please contact our Property Manager to discuss the situation at 360-647-2818. At that time, you can set up a specific appointment time so that this situation does not repeat.

author: Tita rivera
review: Beautiful and very convenient location, rent is a big steep

ownerResponse.text: We appreciate your stellar rating, Tita! Thanks for making a home with us at Barkley.

author: K M
review: We enjoyed living here. I really loved our apartment. Anne is an awesome manager and took immediate action if there was a maintenance problem or neighbor issues. I loved that each unit had a washer and dryer.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your kind words. The Barkley Staff

author: Maghan Haynie
review: This place is not worth the money they are charging for rent. There is no storage space, super small kitchen (which the burners dont work half the time), and parking is terrible. We had a 6 mo lease and had found out 2 weeks before our

author: Allison
review: The only nice thing about this complex is their pool. The pool and hot tub are great. Other than that, expect to get a terribly laid out apartment with appliances that constantly need repairs that are NOT worth the price by any means. The

ownerResponse.text: Hi Allison, we appreciate your feedback and want to be a helpful resource to our Residents. It looks like the ball was dropped with your paperwork and we are sorry for the stress it caused. We definitely don't want that happening again. Since then, we have a team in place with checks a balances to ensure this process. We strive to do a great job and want our Residents feel this on a daily basis. Thank you -Barkley Trails Team

author: Lynn RUTHLESS ANGEL
review: Recently a tenant died unexpectedly from cancer. He and his wife were on a 6 month lease.  But due to his death she needs to move,  thereby breaking the lease.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Lynn, we hear your frustration and empathize with anyone going through something so terrible. We are sad for the loss of loved ones, and what they are going through. We want to be respectful of our Resident's and former Residents privacy. Thank you, Barkley Trails Team

author: Gavri Wolf
review: While the apartments seem nice - and mine did at first - you don't notice a lot of the bad things until you live there for a while. BE AWARE THAT THEY ALLOW BOTH SMOKING AND PETS. This means someone will be smoking outside your bedroom

ownerResponse.text: Gavri,  since 2016 a lot has changed. We look for ways of bettering the community and have been successful at taking feedback and implementing guidelines for all Resident and guest enjoyment. We do have a policy of smoking at least 25' from the building (Washington law). We would hope all of our valued Residents and guests abide by them,  if not, let us know and we will respond accordingly. -Barkley Trails Team

author: alexm jones
review: Asking for admin fees along with application fees. Theres dog rent, dog deposit, AND dog fee. These people are scammers.

ownerResponse.text: We're very sorry to see this review, as our goal is to provide our prospective residents with a clear understanding of our fees and policies. We always encourage our prospective residents to review the application agreement in fine detail to avoid any surprises. It's never our intention to mislead our future residents, and we apologize for the inconvenience. We would be more than happy to review your account with you. Please contact us at 360-647-2818. Thank you.

author: Sean Jerns
review: This company will steal your money. They will take application money, and deny you without stated reason. They will provide you with a credit check that does not offer a score and not explain any reason for denial. They stole 120 dollars from us on March 22 2017. Sketchy! Beware!!

ownerResponse.text: Hi Sean, we wanted to clarify, our process for applications is the same as all screening companies. There is a fee to run the application for each person. There is a pass or fail outcome, or sometimes a conditional approval. The screening company will reply with information regarding the screening. If you input an email, it would go there and hopefully not a spam folder. There is also an option to call them directly. We don't have access to see scores etc. It seems there may have been some miscommunication about the process. We apologize for that and hope this helps when filling out future applications. -Barkley Trails Team

author: Jade Woods
review: After my wife and I paid the application fee, completed the application, and they ran our background and credit check. They asked us to send them a selfie holding our ID's after this was all completed. I was told this was to verify our

author: Ellen Carpentier
review: Its a nice quiet apartment building that responds quickly to our requests.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for awarding Barkley with a stellar rating! It's great that youre happy and comfortable in our communitywe want nothing less for our residents!

author: David Serrano
review: The inside and outside of the apartments are nice. Location is awesome. Office and maintenance staff is friendly and very helpful. All in all we have enjoyed our stay here.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you David for your review of Barkley Trails! We love to hear this from our Residents. -Barkley Trails Team

author: antonio perez
review: RUN, this place doesn't worth the money, they charge for everything, The utilities company they outsourced to Conservice and charge for everything, also if you need a service they will tell you need to find a plumber and pay at your own cost

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for posting a review. We do not include utilities in the lease and so use Conservice to correctly bill residents. Were sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations. We will be taking your feedback to discuss with our team how we can continually improve our processes.

author: Cat
review: Way too many dogs that always bark, CONSTANTLY. Car break-ins are a norm, and there's lots of college kids.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Cat,  Since 2016 there have been a lot of positive changes. Our team is proactive about noise complaints and strive to keep Barkley Trails safe for our Residents. -Barkley Trails Team

author: Dennis Sonner
review: Just moved in. So far I love the place. Very quiet.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you Dennis for sharing! We are so glad you chose Barkley Trails as your home. -Barkley Trails Team

author: Will Griggs
review: This apartment complex is over priced and poorly managed, I would never recommend this place to anyone.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Will,  we are always striving for excellence and value all feedback.  -The team at Barkley Trails

author: Lee
review: Nice Location, the management is friendly!

ownerResponse.text:
Hi Lee,

Thank you for leaving a 5-Star review! At Barkley, we continuously strive to serve you better and we are so glad you are enjoying your residency with us.

We are happy to hear that the team has managed to meet your needs and hope to continue to do so throughout your stay. Thank you again for taking the time to share your experience with others!

Best Wishes,
Barkley Team

author: Kenny Yung
review: I concur with others' negative reviews

ownerResponse.text: Kenny, we value all feedback and are always looking for ways to improve. -Barkley Trails Team

author: Brad Hall
review: Worst place in town by far.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Brad, there have been a lot of changes since 2016. Great location, competitive pricing and a dedicated staff. We value all feedback and hope that if you are needing a place in the future, you'll come see us. -Barkley Trails Team

author: Louis Pula
review: RUN

ownerResponse.text: We would like to hear more about your experience, so that we can understand how to deliver a better experience next time. Please reach out to our leasing office with any suggestions you wish to share.

author: Herty Antonio Jimnez Jalina
review: Excellent service

ownerResponse.text:
Thank you for your excellent rating of Barkley. We sincerely appreciate you recognizing the effort we put towards making this community one of the best.
---
Thank you for your excellent rating of Barkley. We sincerely appreciate you recognizing the effort we put into making this community one of the best.

author: Yesi Contreras
review: These appartements are very expensive and the manager has a bad c

ownerResponse.text: Hi Yesi, we thank you for your feedback.  It is our goal to have a welcoming environment when living at or visiting Barkley Trails. Our rental rates are within our market. We do monthly market surveys to ensure we stay that way. -Barkley Trails Team
